tools.name: git_changed_files_with_diffs
tools.description: Changed files with per-file diff sections in the current repository cwd.
args:
set -u; dl=${LEATHER_GIT_DIFF_LINES:-12}; status=$(git status --porcelain --untracked-files=all); if [ -z "$status" ]; then exit 0; fi; printf '%s
' "$status" | while IFS= read -r line; do code=${line:0:2}; f=${line:3}; case "$f" in *' -> '*) f=${f##* -> };; esac; printf '
===== FILE: %s STATUS: %s =====
' "$f" "$code"; printf '-- staged --
'; staged=$(git diff --cached -- "$f" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$staged" ]; then printf '%s
' "$staged" | head -n "$dl"; else git diff --no-index -- /dev/null "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -n "$dl" || true; fi; printf '
-- unstaged --
'; git diff -- "$f" | head -n "$dl"; if git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- "$f" | grep -qxF "$f"; then printf '
-- untracked --
'; git diff --no-index -- /dev/null "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -n "$dl" || true; fi; done

tools.name: git_file_diff
tools.description: Staged, unstaged, and untracked diff/content for one file. Requires: file.
args:
set -u; f=$1; dl=${LEATHER_GIT_FILE_DIFF_LINES:-60}; printf 'FILE: %s

-- staged --
' "$f"; staged=$(git diff --cached -- "$f" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$staged" ]; then printf '%s
' "$staged" | head -n "$dl"; else git diff --no-index -- /dev/null "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -n "$dl" || true; fi; printf '
-- unstaged --
'; git diff -- "$f" | head -n "$dl"; if git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- "$f" | grep -qxF "$f"; then printf '
-- untracked --
'; git diff --no-index -- /dev/null "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -n "$dl" || true; fi

tools.name: git_enqueue_file_commit
tools.description: Enqueue one per-file commit task via the caller's intake endpoint. Requires: file, message, signing_key.
args:
set -eu; f=$1; msg=$2; key=$3; tmp=$(mktemp); trap 'rm -f "$tmp"' EXIT; chmod 600 "$tmp"; printf 'FILE: %s
MESSAGE: %s
SIGNING_KEY: %s
' "$f" "$msg" "$key" > "$tmp"; curl -sf -X POST "${LEATHER_INTAKE_URL}?kind=cli.git.file_commit&curing=cli-git-commit-file&queue=cli-git-commit-file-in" --data-binary @"$tmp"

tools.name: git_commit_file_signed
tools.description: Stage and GPG-sign commit exactly one file. Requires: file, message, signing_key.
args: set -u; f=$1; msg=$2; key=$3; lock="$(git rev-parse --git-dir)/leather-commit.lock"; exec 9>"$lock"; flock 9; git add -- "$f" && git commit -m "$msg" --gpg-sign="$key" -- "$f"
